name.description: Product display name as shown on the detail page.

brand.description: Brand or Nike sub-brand visible on the page.

product_url.description: Absolute product detail URL (canonical product page).

category.description: Category or collection context (product subtitle on Nike PDP).

gender_or_department.description: Men, women, kids, unisex, or visible department label.

price.description: Current selling price as a number, no currency symbol or thousands separators.

currency.description: Currency code visible or inferable from page locale (ISO 4217).

sale_price.description: Discounted price if separate from regular price; null when there is no separate sale price.

color.description: Visible colorway shown on the page.

sizes.description: Available sizes when visible; empty when the product has no size selector (e.g. a football).

availability.description: In stock, sold out, limited, or page-visible equivalent. Inferred from buy state / past availabilityDate when no explicit schema.org availability is present.

examples: Score goal after goal with this Erling Haaland Academy Football. Crafted with our innovative OmniSculpt technology, it features grooves debossed into the casing to deliver truer flight.

sku.description: Product SKU / style-color code if visible.

source_url.description: Page URL used as evidence for extraction.

fetched_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the page was fetched, for traceability. Generated at crawl time.
